name: Barbell Overhead Press (Strict)
setup: Bar at upper-chest height in squat rack
Step under bar, bar resting on front delts (full grip)
Unrack, step back, feet hip-width, core braced
execution: Press bar directly overhead — bar path should go back slightly
Head moves back to let bar pass face, then moves forward under bar
Lock out directly over shoulders, not forward
Lower under control to front delts
common_mistakes: Not tucking elbows in front at start
cues: Bar over your heels at lockout
Nose through the window on the way up
Squeeze glutes throughout to protect lower back
